titleStmt.title: SII 38.569: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 569.

p.hi: King: Achyutarāya Year: Śaka 1459, Hemavaḷambi, Phalguṇa ba. di. 7, Guruvāra = Thursday, 21 February 1538 A.D.

summary.p: This records the gift of a canal consisted of a talaparigi channel below the tank of Nagaragere and of a tank called Gūḷiseṭikuṇṭe in Aḍabāṟahaḷḷi, the water of which was to be used for the sacred bath (abhishēka) of the gods Pāpavināśadēva, Raghunāthadēva and Vīrēśvaradēva of Lēpākshi. Also it records a grant of land for providing food offerings (amṛitapaḍi) to these three gods. The donors were the aśēsha-mahājanas of Nagaragere alias Kṛishṇarāya-samudra, belonging to Rodanāḍ in Penugoṇḍe-rājya. The recipient was Viraṇṇa, younger brother of Virupaṇṇa of Penugoṇḍa.
It is also stated that this record was a copy of the original letter-charter (Patra-śāsahr).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrī pāpanāśadēvasya vīrabhadrēśvaraśya ca . viṣṇōrvicitramūrttē śrī raghunāthā(ṁ)hvayaśyaca . nitya .Each line
kṛtyābhiṣēkādi . sēvāvaibhava sidhayē vīrapaṁṇānujēna śrī vīrabhūpēna dharmataḥ . saṁpāditasya naga
rageregrāmasya sīmana sākṣāddakṣiṇa vārāṇasyabhidhānānvatasyaca . mahākulyāpravāhasya . patraśāsanapadha
ti . likhyatē lōkavikhyātē . śāsanērsmi śilāmayē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁga
ḷu 1459 neya hēmaḷaṁbi saṁvatsarada phālguṇa ba 7 guruvāradalu . śrīmatu lēpākṣada pāpavināśa dēvarigū
raghunātha dēvarigū vīrēśvara dēvarigū . penugoṁḍerājya roda nāḍoḷagaṇa nagaragerege pratināmavādakṛṣṇarāyasa
mudrada Agrahāradalu yajanādi ṣaṭa(ṁ)rma naratarāda padavākya pramāṇajñarāda nānāgōtrada nānāsūtrada nānāśā
kheya Asēṣavirdda mahājanaṁgaḷu koṭṭa bhūdānapatrada kramaveṁteṁdare . naṁma nagaregere kere hiṁda
ṇa nuligoṁbinahaḷigina dṛvavuṁḍigeya tōṁṭasthaḷake paḍuvalu cavuṁḍēśvari mānyada gadege baḍagaṇa talapari
geya kāluveyanū śrīpāpavināśa dēvarigū śrīraghunātha dēvarigū śrīvīrēśvara dēvarigū Abhiṣēkādi sē
vānimityaṁgaḷige dhāreyaneradu koṭu . niṁma kaiyalū I mūru dēvarigū Amṛtapaḍi vaibhavaṁgaḷige salu
va Aḍabāṟahaḷige saluva gūḷiseṭikuṁṭeyanū Ā kuṁṭevoḷagaṇa nīrateṁkiyanū Ā kuṁṭege saluva
gadeyanū . śrīpāpavināśadēvaru raghunāthadēvaru vīrēśvara dēvarugaḷa nirūpaviḍidu lēpākṣi naṁdilakiseṭiyara makka
ḷu penugaṁḍeya vīrapaṁṇagaḷa taṁmaṁdiru vīraṇa dhārāpūrvakavā
gi dhāreyanerasikoṁḍu yī kāluveyanū I dēvarugaḷige vāgi nāvū mahā
janaṁgaḷu trivācā sarvasaṁmatavāgi dhāreyaneradu ko nū I dēvarugaḷige Ācaṁ
drārkavāgi sūryacaṁdrādigaḷuvuḷalipariyaṁtrāsaluvamaṁ talaparigeya kāluveya bhūdāna pa
tra . I bhūdāna patrava koṭa mahājanaṁgaḷa vopita vara ḷa mūla sādhanadalli Idhāvū .
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ . kālē kālē pālanēyō bhavadbhiḥ . rtā bhāvinaḥ pārthivēṁ
Digital edition of SII 38.569 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
